message: 🆘 सफदरजंग हॉस्पिटल में बहुत ज्यादा खून बहने के कारण 3 यूनिट O- ब्लड की तुरंत आवश्यकता है। मरीज की हालत गंभीर है, कोई डोनर हो तो जल्दी आएं।
message_english: 🆘 3 units of O- blood are needed immediately due to heavy bleeding at Safdarjung Hospital. The patient's condition is critical, if there is a donor, please come quickly.

message: एम्स दिल्ली में एक गंभीर सड़क दुर्घटना हुई है। 4 यूनिट B+ ब्लड की तुरंत आवश्यकता है। मरीज ICU में है। कृपया संपर्क करें 9811122233
message_english: A severe road accident has happened at AIIMS Delhi. 4 units of B+ blood are needed immediately. Patient is in ICU. Please contact 9811122233

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में हार्ट अटैक के मरीज के लिए 2 यूनिट AB+ खून की अत्यंत इमरजेंसी है। सर्जरी अभी होनी है। कृपया मदद करें 9988776655
message_english: There is an extreme emergency for 2 units of AB+ blood for a heart attack patient at Apollo Chennai. Surgery has to be done right now. Please help 9988776655

message: फोर्टिस गुड़गांव के ICU में भर्ती मरीज को बचाने के लिए 5 यूनिट A+ ब्लड अभी चाहिए। समय बिल्कुल नहीं है, डोनर्स प्लीज पहुंचें।
message_english: 5 units of A+ blood needed right now to save a patient admitted in ICU at Fortis Gurgaon. There is absolutely no time, donors please reach.

message: KEM मुंबई में एक्सीडेंट के बाद बहुत खून बह गया है। 3 यूनिट O+ ब्लड जल्द से जल्द चाहिए। जो भी डोनर पास हो कृपया कॉल करें 8888000011
message_english: A lot of blood has been lost after an accident at KEM Mumbai. 3 units of O+ blood needed as soon as possible. Whichever donor is nearby please call 8888000011

message: पीजीआईएमईआर चंडीगढ़ में इमरजेंसी सर्जरी चल रही है। 2 यूनिट A- ब्लड की बहुत ज्यादा जरूरत है। जिंदगी और मौत का सवाल है।
message_english: Emergency surgery is going on at PGIMER Chandigarh. 2 units of A- blood are badly needed. It is a matter of life and death.

message: मैक्स साकेत में इंटरनल ब्लीडिंग के कारण मरीज की हालत बिगड़ रही है। कल सुबह तक 2 यूनिट B- ब्लड अरेंज करना है।
message_english: Patient's condition is deteriorating due to internal bleeding at Max Saket. Need to arrange 2 units of B- blood by tomorrow morning.

message: मेदांता अस्पताल में सीवियर डेंगू के मरीज के लिए 3 यूनिट O+ ब्लड चाहिए। डोनर कृपया आज शाम तक 9123456780 पर संपर्क करें।
message_english: 3 units of O+ blood needed for a severe dengue patient at Medanta hospital. Donor please contact 9123456780 by this evening.

message: नारायणा बैंगलोर में ऑर्गन फेल्योर के इलाज के लिए 1 यूनिट A+ ब्लड की आवश्यकता है। कृपया मैसेज शेयर करें।
message_english: 1 unit of A+ blood is required for the treatment of organ failure at Narayana Bangalore. Please share the message.

message: सर गंगा राम दिल्ली में प्लेटलेट्स कम होने की वजह से 2 यूनिट AB- ब्लड की सख्त जरूरत है। नंबर 7000070000
message_english: Due to low platelets, 2 units of AB- blood are strictly needed at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. Number 7000070000

message: लीलावती मुंबई में लिवर डैमेज के मरीज को 3 यूनिट O- खून चाहिए। डोनर प्लीज जल्द अस्पताल पहुंचें।
message_english: 3 units of O- blood needed for a liver damage patient at Lilavati Mumbai. Donor please reach the hospital soon.

message_english: 2 units of B+ blood needed as soon as possible due to severe anemia at CMC Vellore. Donors please talk on 9090909090.

message_english: There is a surgery next week at KIMS Hyderabad. Have to deposit 1 unit of A- blood in the blood bank. If any donor, message 9988998899

message: एम्स दिल्ली में रूटीन ट्रांसफ्यूजन के लिए 2 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड चाहिए। शुक्रवार तक इंतजाम करना है।
message_english: 2 units of AB+ blood needed for routine transfusion at AIIMS Delhi. Have to arrange it by Friday.

message: सफदरजंग अस्पताल में रूटीन चेकअप और ब्लड रिप्लेसमेंट के लिए 1 यूनिट O+ ब्लड की आवश्यकता है। जो डोनेट कर सके 8000080000 पर बताएं।
message_english: 1 unit of O+ blood is required for routine checkup and blood replacement at Safdarjung Hospital. Whoever can donate please tell on 8000080000.

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में अगले बुधवार बाईपास सर्जरी शेड्यूल है। 2 यूनिट B- ब्लड की आवश्यकता होगी। कृपया मदद करें।
message_english: Bypass surgery is scheduled for next Wednesday at Apollo Chennai. 2 units of B- blood will be needed. Please help.

message: इस रविवार को दिल्ली के लाजपत नगर में एक विशाल रक्तदान शिविर है। कृपया आएं और अपना योगदान दें।
message_english: There is a huge blood donation camp at Lajpat Nagar, Delhi this Sunday. Please come and make your contribution.

message: मेरे चाचाजी के लिए मुंबई में A+ ब्लड देने वाले सभी लोगों का हृदय से धन्यवाद। वह अब बिल्कुल स्वस्थ हैं। 🙏
message_english: Heartfelt thanks to everyone who donated A+ blood for my uncle in Mumbai. He is completely healthy now. 🙏

message: क्या कोई मुझे बता सकता है कि बुखार उतरने के कितने दिन बाद हम रक्तदान कर सकते हैं? मुझे जानकारी चाहिए। कॉल करें 9123491234
message_english: Can someone tell me how many days after the fever subsides we can donate blood? I need information. Call 9123491234

message: चंडीगढ़ में रक्तदान के लिए एक नई डोनर अवेयरनेस ड्राइव शुरू हुई है। कृपया ज्यादा से ज्यादा लोग जुड़ें और सपोर्ट करें।
message_english: A new donor awareness drive for blood donation has started in Chandigarh. Please join and support in large numbers.

message: Bhai log Fortis Gurgaon me ek bura accident case aya hai. 3 unit B+ blood URGENTLY chahiye!! Patient admitted hai. Pls koi jaldi aao 9811122233
message_english: Brothers, a bad accident case has come to Fortis Gurgaon. 3 units of B+ blood URGENTLY needed!! Patient is admitted. Pls someone come quickly 9811122233

message: KEM Mumbai me patient ICU me sinking condition me hai. 4 unit O- blood ekdum emergency me chahiye. Please help, jaldi donate karo!
message_english: Patient is in sinking condition in ICU at KEM Mumbai. 4 units of O- blood are needed in an absolute emergency. Please help, donate quickly!

message: CMC Vellore me ICU me admitted patient ko 2 unit A+ blood chahiye abhi ke abhi. Doctors bol rhe hain bilkul time nahi hai. Call 9990001112
message_english: Patient admitted in ICU at CMC Vellore needs 2 units of A+ blood right now. Doctors are saying there is absolutely no time. Call 9990001112

message: KIMS Hyderabad me multiple fractures ke karan patient critical hai. 5 unit AB- blood ki bohot urgent need hai. Please share sabko 🙏
message_english: Patient is critical due to multiple fractures at KIMS Hyderabad. There is a very urgent need for 5 units of AB- blood. Please share to everyone 🙏

message_english: Heart failure emergency at Narayana Bangalore. 3 units of O+ blood needed immediately for resuscitation. Please donate friends 8888000011

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me operation beech me ruka hai blood loss ki wajah se. 2 unit B- blood ekdum turant zaruri hai. Pls help!!
message_english: Operation is paused midway due to blood loss at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. 2 units of B- blood are absolutely immediately necessary. Pls help!!

message: Lilavati Mumbai me massive hemorrhage ho raha hai delivery ke baad. 4 unit A- blood chahiye within 30 mins. Ekdum urgent hai. Call 7777766666
message_english: Massive hemorrhage is happening after delivery at Lilavati Mumbai. 4 units of A- blood needed within 30 mins. It is absolutely urgent. Call 7777766666

message: Max Saket me poison consume karne ka case aaya hai. 2 unit AB+ blood ki immediate zaroorat hai wash ke liye. Please koi ignore mat karna.
message_english: A poison consumption case has arrived at Max Saket. Immediate need for 2 units of AB+ blood for wash. Please no one ignore.

message: Emergency trauma case aaya hai AIIMS Delhi me. 3 unit O- blood chahiye abhi ke abhi. Khoon bohot beh chuka hai. Contact 9123491234
message_english: Emergency trauma case has arrived at AIIMS Delhi. 3 units of O- blood needed right now. A lot of blood has been lost. Contact 9123491234

message: Apollo Chennai me patient chemo support par hai. 1 unit B+ blood required hai kal subah tak. Count bohot low chal raha hai.
message_english: Patient is on chemo support at Apollo Chennai. 1 unit of B+ blood is required by tomorrow morning. Count is running very low.

message: PGIMER Chandigarh me dialysis ke baad problem aa gayi hai. 2 unit A+ blood ka prabandh karna hai kal dopahar tak. Please help. 8000080000
message_english: Problem has arisen after dialysis at PGIMER Chandigarh. Have to arrange 2 units of A+ blood by tomorrow afternoon. Please help. 8000080000

message: Medanta me urgent transplant ki preparation chal rahi hai. 3 unit O+ chahiye donor kal ke liye. Blood bank empty hai.
message_english: Preparation for urgent transplant is going on at Medanta. Need 3 units of O+ donor for tomorrow. Blood bank is empty.

message: Safdarjung hospital me kal operation hona hai. 2 unit AB- blood chahiye reserve me rakhne ke liye. Please check karke batao. 9898989898
message_english: Operation is to happen tomorrow at Safdarjung hospital. 2 units of AB- blood needed to keep in reserve. Please check and tell. 9898989898

message: Fortis Gurgaon me internal bleeding chal rahi hai. 1 unit B- blood chahiye raat 8 baje tak. Please groups me share karo.
message_english: Internal bleeding is going on at Fortis Gurgaon. 1 unit of B- blood needed by 8 PM tonight. Please share in the groups.

message: KEM Mumbai me patient ka low hb hai, weakness bohot hai. 3 unit A- blood chahiye kal subah tak. DM me agar aap de sakte ho. 9123491234
message_english: Patient has low hb at KEM Mumbai, there is a lot of weakness. 3 units of A- blood needed by tomorrow morning. DM me if you can give. 9123491234

message: CMC Vellore me gastric bleed ka patient admitted hai. 2 unit O- required urgently aaj hi. Blood group rare hai please dhoondo.
message_english: Gastric bleed patient is admitted at CMC Vellore. 2 units of O- required urgently today itself. Blood group is rare please search.

message: Narayana Bangalore me bypass surgery schedule hui hai achanak. 2 unit AB+ chahiye kal dopehar tak for safe side. Please call 8888000011
message_english: Bypass surgery has been scheduled suddenly at Narayana Bangalore. 2 units of AB+ needed by tomorrow afternoon for safe side. Please call 8888000011

message: Lilavati Mumbai me liver failure ka extreme case aaya hai. 3 unit O+ chahiye turant doctor ne bola hai.
message_english: An extreme liver failure case has arrived at Lilavati Mumbai. 3 units of O+ needed immediately doctor has said.

message: KIMS Hyderabad me routine dialysis hona hai is week. 1 unit A+ blood chahiye hoga. Koi healthy donor free ho toh batana 9988998899 par.
message_english: Routine dialysis is to happen this week at KIMS Hyderabad. 1 unit of A+ blood will be needed. If any healthy donor is free, let me know on 9988998899.

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me chacha ji ki planned surgery hai Friday ko. Blood bank ne 2 unit B- deposit karne ko bola hai.
message_english: Uncle's planned surgery is on Friday at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. The blood bank has asked to deposit 2 units of B-.

message: Max Saket me next week surgery ke liye 1 unit O+ blood arrange karna hai. Doctor ne bola abhi se donor ready rakho. Call 9811122233
message_english: Need to arrange 1 unit of O+ blood for surgery next week at Max Saket. The doctor said to keep the donor ready from now. Call 9811122233

message: AIIMS Delhi me spinal surgery schedule honi hai Tuesday ko. 2 unit AB- blood dena padega hospital me replacement ke liye.
message_english: Spinal surgery is to be scheduled at AIIMS Delhi on Tuesday. Will have to give 2 units of AB- blood in the hospital for replacement.

message: Upcoming chemo support ke liye Apollo Chennai me 1 unit B+ blood chahiye aane wale somvaar ke liye. Contact 7777766666
message_english: 1 unit of B+ blood is needed for upcoming chemo support at Apollo Chennai for the coming Monday. Contact 7777766666

message: Planned tumor removal hai PGIMER Chandigarh me is weekend. Blood bank ne 2 unit A- blood secure karne ko bola hai safe side.
message_english: Planned tumor removal is at PGIMER Chandigarh this weekend. Blood bank has told to secure 2 units of A- blood on the safe side.

message: Delhi walo, is sunday Dwarka sector 10 me mega blood camp hai. Free health checkup bhi hoga. Jarur aao donate karne.
message_english: Delhi folks, there is a mega blood camp in Dwarka sector 10 this Sunday. There will be a free health checkup too. Definitely come to donate.

message: Jisne bhi mere cousin ke liye O- blood donate kiya unko Thank You so much! Wo ab recovering stage me hain.
message_english: Thank You so much to whoever donated O- blood for my cousin! They are in the recovering stage now.

message: Vaccination ke kitne din baad blood donate kar sakte hain? Mujhe Pune me kal camp me jana hai. Kisi ko idea hai? Call 9123491234
message_english: How many days after vaccination can one donate blood? I have to go to a camp in Pune tomorrow. Does anyone have an idea? Call 9123491234

message: Bangalore me reliable blood donor groups ka koi link hai kya jo emergency me kaam aate hain? Society group me dalna hai.
message_english: Is there any link for reliable blood donor groups in Bangalore that come in handy in emergencies? Need to put it in the society group.

message: Youth ko awareness phailani chahiye! Har 3 mahine me ek baar blood donate karo aur life save karo. Chennai ke logo ko forward karo.
message_english: Youth should spread awareness! Donate blood once every 3 months and save a life. Forward to people of Chennai.

message: Humari IT company Gurgaon me Friday ko corporate blood drive organise kar rahi hai. Apne colleagues ko zarur le aao. RSVP 8000080000
message_english: Our IT company is organizing a corporate blood drive in Gurgaon on Friday. Definitely bring your colleagues. RSVP 8000080000
